# opnsense_system_vip (Resource)

Manages a virtual IP (CARP, IP Alias, Proxy ARP) on OPNsense.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "opnsense_system_vip" "web_vip" {
  interface   = "lan"
  mode        = "ipalias"
  address     = "10.0.0.100"
  subnet_bits = 24
  description = "Web service VIP"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `address` (String) IP address.
- `interface` (String) Interface (e.g., `lan`, `wan`).
- `subnet_bits` (Number) CIDR subnet mask bits (e.g., `24`).

### Optional

- `adv_base` (Number) CARP advertisement interval (1-254).
- `adv_skew` (Number) CARP advertisement skew (0-254).
- `description` (String) Description.
- `mode` (String) VIP type: `ipalias`, `carp`, or `proxyarp`.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) CARP password.
- `vhid` (Number) VHID for CARP (1-255).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID.

## Import

```shell
terraform import opnsense_system_vip.example 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012
```
